commands.review_summary:
The PR updates auth-profile save handling so runtime-only external OAuth profiles are kept in active runtime snapshots while remaining excluded from persisted auth files, and adds regression coverage for normal and disk-only save paths.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main writes the disk-filtered localStore into active runtime snapshots, and the linked issue gives concrete save-trigger symptoms for anthropic:claude-cli. I did not run tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair remains; the remaining decision is maintainer acceptance of the auth/session-state risk and any desired live Claude CLI smoke before merge.
